description_long: This object is a futuristic, double-bladed sword with translucent, icy blue blades that taper to sharp points. The blades are symmetrically arranged and appear to be made from a material resembling energy or crystal, giving off a faint glow. The central hilt is compact and metallic, featuring ergonomic grooves for grip and a small blue accent at the base. The design is sleek and aggressive, with no visible guard separating the handle from the blades. The overall appearance suggests a weapon designed for both intimidation and efficiency, likely inspired by science fiction aesthetics. Its construction and materials imply it is lightweight yet durable, suitable for swift, precise movements.
description: A sleek, double-bladed sword with translucent blue blades and a compact, metallic handle, exuding a futuristic, energy-based design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both translucent blue blades and the full width of the metallic handle with blue accent.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the double blades and the narrow, streamlined handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the symmetry of the blades and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim, sharp profile of the blades and handle.
attribute_handle_design: short, metallic, ergonomic grooves, blue accent, compact
